productName: Lish Organics - Rosin Dabs - DOH - Tested - GMO - 1g
description: This hybrid rosin is the connoisseur's clean dab: GMO coaxed into honey-gold oil by heat and pressure alone, with nothing washed out and nothing added in. Flavor-forward and full-spectrum, with notes of blue cheese, cheese, and earthy, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
